overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a Victorian residential garden at night. The character traverses brick pathways past historic houses with warm lantern lighting, lush vegetation, and outdoor courtyard furniture, transitioning from a walled garden to a street-side promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential garden pathway approaching main house entrance

events.description: character turns right to follow path alongside the house wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along brick pathway toward yellow Victorian house, then turning to follow side path

entered.detail: tall brick wall running along left side of garden with decorative capstones
two-story wooden Victorian house with horizontal siding and red front door
tropical palm fronds overhanging the pathway on the right
lush garden shrubs with red flowers lining the pathway
red brick paving stones forming the garden walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lush residential garden at night, approaching a yellow Victorian house with a red door. Warm light from exterior wall lamps illuminates the brick pathway and dense tropical vegetation. The character turns right to follow a narrow path between the house and a tall brick perimeter wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side passage transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: exits narrow side passage into open courtyard with outdoor seating
emerges into more brightly lit courtyard area with multiple light sources

agents.ego_description: continuing along narrow path before entering an open courtyard with outdoor furniture

entered.detail: wooden patio table with chairs for outdoor dining
large dark canvas umbrella over the dining area
decorative water feature visible in the center of the courtyard
tree with pink blossoms providing color to the night scene

segments.scene_description: The character moves from a narrow passage between buildings into an open courtyard illuminated by warm lantern light. The space features outdoor dining furniture with umbrellas, a central fountain, and flowering trees. The transition from enclosed side path to open garden creates a sense of emerging into a private residential oasis.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornamental garden with flowering trees and benches

events.description: garden opens up to reveal street and neighboring houses in the distance

agents.ego_description: strolling through landscaped garden past benches and flowering trees, heading toward street

entered.detail: ornate metal and wooden benches for seating along the path
decorative black metal fence marking property boundary
adjacent historic house with illuminated windows visible through trees
park-style bench under the flowering trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a beautifully landscaped garden featuring pink flowering trees, garden benches, and dense hedges. The path curves gently as the neighborhood becomes visible through the foliage, with wrought iron fences and neighboring Victorian houses appearing in the background. The scene transitions from private courtyard to semi-public garden space.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street sidewalk with Victorian porches

events.description: transitions from garden path to street-side promenade with trolley tracks visible
character turns slightly to follow the fence line along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street side past Victorian houses with ornate porches and wrought iron fences

entered.detail: paved street with visible trolley or train tracks running along it
ornate wooden porch with stairs and hanging plants
decorative metal gate entrance to the property
metal rails embedded in the street for tram or trolley cars

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the garden onto a residential street lined with Victorian houses featuring ornate porches and wrought iron fences. The cobblestone street with trolley tracks is visible beyond the fence, and street lamps illuminate the scene with warm golden light. The character walks along the property line, passing hanging plants and decorative architectural details of the historic homes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a private Victorian garden that gradually opens into a lit residential street. It begins by following a character along a brick pathway past a yellow house with a red door, moving through dense tropical vegetation before turning into a narrow passage beside a tall brick wall. As the path widens, the scene expands into an open courtyard oasis featuring a central fountain, outdoor dining furniture, and flowering trees illuminated by warm lantern light. The camera then glides through a landscaped garden of pink blossoms and hedges, where the view shifts from private seclusion to a glimpse of neighboring houses and wrought iron fences. Finally, the character emerges from the greenery onto a cobblestone street with trolley tracks, passing ornate porches and hanging plants under the golden glow of street lamps.
